pi_items.source: task.json description explicitly requesting a private channel
task.json description and user creation in setup_rocket_chat.sh

privileged_info_summary: The task operates in a synthetically seeded Rocket.Chat environment. The target channel to be created must be exactly named 'security-incidents', configured as a 'private' channel (not visible to everyone), and the pre-existing synthetic user 'agent.user' must be added as a member. These parameters are explicitly defined in the task description and environment setup scripts.
